# NE Trades - LLMs.txt

> NE1 Digital builds professional websites and local SEO strategies for trade, beauty, and service businesses across the North East of England.

## About

NE1 Digital (trading as NE Trades) is a specialist web design and SEO agency that works with trade businesses, beauty professionals, and local service companies. Based in North Shields, Tyne and Wear, we help local businesses get found on Google and generate more enquiries.

## Services

- [Websites for Trades](https://netrades.co.uk/services/websites-for-trades): Professional websites designed to convert visitors into phone calls and quote requests.
- [Local SEO](https://netrades.co.uk/services/local-seo): Search engine optimisation targeting local customers searching for services in specific areas.
- [Google Business Profile](https://netrades.co.uk/services/google-business-profile): Optimisation of Google Business listings to appear in the local map pack.
- [Service Area Pages](https://netrades.co.uk/services/service-area-pages): Location-specific pages targeting individual towns and areas.
- [SEO for Trades](https://netrades.co.uk/services/seo): Comprehensive search engine optimisation built specifically for local businesses.
- [AI & Generative SEO](https://netrades.co.uk/services/ai-seo): Optimisation for AI-powered search tools including ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews.
- [Ongoing SEO Support](https://netrades.co.uk/services/ongoing-seo): Monthly SEO management to maintain and improve search rankings over time.
- [Hosting & Care](https://netrades.co.uk/services/hosting-and-care): Fast hosting, SSL, daily backups, and ongoing website maintenance.

## Traditional Trades

- [Electricians](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/electricians): Domestic and commercial electrical contractors
- [Plumbers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/plumbers): Plumbing, heating and gas engineers
- [Builders](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/builders): General builders and construction firms
- [Roofers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/roofers): Roofing contractors and repair specialists
- [Decorators](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/decorators): Painters, decorators and plasterers
- [Joiners & Carpenters](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/joiners): Joiners, carpenters and cabinet makers
- [Landscapers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/landscapers): Garden design and landscaping services
- [Heating Engineers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/heating-engineers): Boiler servicing and central heating
- [Plasterers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/plasterers): Plastering, rendering and skimming
- [Tilers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/tilers): Floor and wall tiling specialists
- [Scaffolders](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/scaffolders): Scaffolding erection and hire
- [Drainage Engineers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/drainage-engineers): Drain repairs, CCTV surveys and unblocking
- [Locksmiths](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/locksmiths): Emergency and residential locksmith services
- [Window & Door Fitters](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/window-door-fitters): UPVC, aluminium and composite installations
- [Groundworkers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/groundworkers): Foundations, drainage and excavation

## Beauty & Wellness

- [Hair Salons & Barbers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/hair-salons): Salons, barber shops and mobile hairdressers
- [Beauty Therapists](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/beauty-therapists): Aesthetics, facials and skin treatments
- [Nail Technicians](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/nail-technicians): Nail bars, gel nails and mobile nail techs
- [Mobile Beauty & Makeup](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/mobile-beauty): Mobile makeup artists and beauty services
- [Massage & Spa](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/massage-therapists): Massage therapists and spa services

## Service Businesses

- [Cleaners](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/cleaners): Domestic and commercial cleaning services
- [Dog Groomers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/dog-groomers): Pet grooming and dog grooming salons
- [Personal Trainers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/personal-trainers): PTs, fitness coaches and gym instructors
- [Photographers](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/photographers): Wedding, portrait and commercial photography
- [Driving Instructors](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/driving-instructors): ADI qualified driving lesson providers
- [Mechanics](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/mechanics): Mobile and garage-based vehicle repairs
- [Garden Maintenance](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/garden-maintenance): Lawn care, hedge trimming and garden tidying
- [Pest Control](https://netrades.co.uk/trades/pest-control): Residential and commercial pest management

## Areas We Cover

We serve businesses across the North East of England including:

- [Newcastle upon Tyne](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/newcastle)
- [Sunderland](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/sunderland)
- [Gateshead](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/gateshead)
- [Durham](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/durham)
- [North Shields](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/north-shields)

- [Whitley Bay](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/whitley-bay)
- [Tynemouth](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/tynemouth)
- [Wallsend](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/wallsend)

- [Ashington](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/ashington)

- [Hexham](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/hexham)
- [Darlington](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/darlington)
- [Hartlepool](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/hartlepool)
- [Middlesbrough](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/middlesbrough)
- [Stockton-on-Tees](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/stockton-on-tees)
- [Washington](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/washington)
- [Chester-le-Street](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/chester-le-street)
- [Consett](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/consett)
- [Bishop Auckland](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/bishop-auckland)

- [Hebburn](https://netrades.co.uk/locations/hebburn)

## Pricing

- **Business Package**: £997 setup + £99/month — includes custom website, SEO structure, hosting, support
- **Pro SEO Package**: £395/month — includes ongoing SEO, content updates, local SEO, competitor analysis
